title: Ancient Celestial Emperor
content:
The 
Ancient Celestial Emperor
 is the monarch of the 
Ancient Celestial Realm
. Under him served four mighty generals, whose descendants are the 
Four Divine Sect
.

Background
[
]

When the Heaven Defying Bead appeared and divided the Celestial Realm into two, he remained, and still remains, within the inner realm's Celestial Realm in closed door cultivation. His nine concubines turned traitor and currently rule over the outer realm's Celestial Realm. The Lord of The Sealed Realm was his servant.

Warning Spoiler

His real name is 
Su Dao
, he is the master of the 
Seven Colour Sect
 and he is the Seven Coloured Immortal Venerate who created the 
Cave World
 they ruled over in the first place.

He stole a Heavenly Dao to breathe life into his cave and used every inhabitant to produce Joss Flames for him. He also created 
Divine Retribution
 to kill any Cultivator who has the will to defy his heaven.

When the door to the 
Immortal Astral Continent
 was opened the residents of the Cave World found themselves fighting against 
Celestial Clan

Lian Daofei
 and 
Ancient Clan

Ye Mo
. 

During these events he and his sect were seriously damaged. He was forced to separate his soul into ten parts, which are three main souls (represented by his 
cultivation power
, 
perception of the natural law
 and his 
memory
) and seven spirits including: 
Situ Nan
, 
Mu Bingmei
, 
Qin Lin
, 
Qing Shui
 and 
Xie Qing
 alongside 2 others.

His sect was dismembered and those who survived used the body of Ye Mo as a means of rehabilitation.
